terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using the ACIKY platform you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.
terms.use1: The site is available to anyone interested in Kundalini Yoga
terms.use2: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account
terms.use3: You are responsible for keeping your password secure
terms.use4: Unauthorized commercial use is not permitted
terms.content1: Testimonials are reviewed before they are published
terms.content2: You must not post offensive content, spam, or false information
terms.content3: We reserve the right to reject or remove testimonials that do not meet our standards
terms.content4: By submitting a testimonial you authorize ACIKY to publish it on the site
terms.blog1: Only instructors and administrators authorized by ACIKY may publish articles on the blog
terms.blog2: All published content must be aligned with the teachings of Kundalini Yoga as taught by Yogi Bhajan
terms.blog3: CEU ACIKY Tribunal reviews and validates each article before publication to ensure doctrinal consistency
terms.blog4: We reserve the right to reject, modify, or remove any publication that does not meet the standards of the teachings
terms.blog5: The author is responsible for the accuracy and originality of the content they submit
terms.ip: All site content (text, images, design) is owned by ACIKY or used with permission. Reproduction without express permission is not allowed.
terms.liability: ACIKY is not responsible for service interruptions, content errors, or damages arising from use of the site. Published information is for guidance only and does not replace professional medical or spiritual advice.
terms.termination: We may suspend or delete accounts that violate these terms. You may also request deletion of your account at any time by contacting us.
terms.changes: We may update these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page. Continued use of the site implies acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.donations1: Donations received go to the ACIKY general fund to finance activities, events, and community maintenance. They are not tax-deductible.
terms.donations2: Donations are voluntary and non-refundable once confirmed by the ACIKY team.
terms.donations3: ACIKY verifies payments manually against its PayPal history. Confirmation may take up to 48 hours.
terms.donations4: The donor's name and email are stored solely for internal record-keeping and are not shared with third parties.
terms.donations5: ACIKY reserves the right to change, add, or remove available payment methods at any time.
terms.contact: Have questions? Contact us via WhatsApp or through our contact page.
